meta.title: 语言的边界与不可言说
meta.title_ko: 언어의 경계와 언설할 수 없는 것
meta.description: Native-level philosophical discourse on the limits of language and the ineffable in Chinese: idioms, Daoist concepts, formal comparative/causal grammar.
meta.description_ko: 원어민 수준의 언어의 경계·불가언설 철학 담화: 성어, 도가 개념, 격식체 비교·인과 문형.

explanation.en: 「不可言说」means "the ineffable", something that cannot be adequately expressed through language.
explanation.ko: 「不可言说」는 언어로 충분히 표현할 수 없는 것, 즉 '불가언설'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「不可言说」是什么意思？(What does 不可言说 mean?)
choices: 不可言说(the ineffable — that which cannot be expressed in words)

explanation.en: This idiom means something can only be intuitively grasped, difficult to express clearly through language.
explanation.ko: 이 성어는 어떤 것을 오직 직관적으로 체득할 수 있을 뿐 말로 명확히 전달하기 어렵다는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 「只可意会，不可言传」是什么意思？(What does 只可意会，不可言传 mean?)
choices: 只能凭直觉去心领神会，难以用言语清楚表达(can only be understood intuitively, difficult to express clearly in words)

explanation.en: This phrase means words are finite, but the meaning and resonance they evoke can be infinite.
explanation.ko: 이 표현은 말은 유한하지만 그 안에 담긴 의미와 여운은 무한할 수 있다는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 「言有尽而意无穷」是什么意思？(What does 言有尽而意无穷 mean?)
choices: 语言可以完全穷尽所有意义
言语虽然有限，但其中蕴含的意味却无穷无尽(words are limited, but the meaning they contain is infinite)
意义完全独立于语言存在

explanation.en: 「语言的局限性」refers to language's inherent inadequacy in fully expressing certain complex or profound experiences.
explanation.ko: 「语言的局限性」는 특정 복잡하거나 심오한 체험을 표현하는 데 있어 언어의 본질적 한계를 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「语言的局限性」通常指什么？(What does 语言的局限性 usually refer to?)
choices: 语言能够完美表达一切思想与情感
语言是获取真理的唯一途径
语言完全独立于思维之外
语言在表达某些复杂或深刻体验时存在固有的不足(language's inherent inadequacy in expressing certain complex or profound experiences)

explanation.en: This Daoist phrase from the Dao De Jing means the most profound things often transcend concrete sensory manifestation.
explanation.ko: 도덕경의 이 구절은 진정으로 심오한 것은 흔히 구체적인 감각적 형태를 초월한다는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 「大音希声，大象无形」是什么意思？(What does 大音希声，大象无形 mean?)
choices: 最伟大的声音听起来反而近乎无声，最伟大的形象反而没有具体的形状——真正深刻的事物往往超越了具体的感官形式(the greatest sound is nearly silent, the greatest image is formless — truly profound things often transcend concrete sensory form)
声音越大越好，形象越具体越好
一切事物都必须有具体形态

explanation.en: 「不可言说」means "the ineffable".
explanation.ko: 「不可言说」는 '언어로 표현할 수 없는 것'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 有些深刻的情感体验，例如刻骨铭心的悲痛，往往属于___的范畴，难以用言语完全表达。(Some profound emotional experiences, such as heart-wrenching grief, often belong to the category of the ineffable, hard to fully express in words.)

explanation.en: 「只可意会，不可言传」describes something only intuitively understood.
explanation.ko: 「只可意会，不可言传」는 직관적으로만 이해할 수 있음을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 禅宗强调顿悟的境界___，唯有通过亲身体验方能领会其中真谛。(Zen Buddhism emphasizes that the state of sudden enlightenment can only be intuitively grasped, difficult to express in words; only through personal experience can one comprehend its true essence.)

explanation.en: 「言有尽而意无穷」describes words being finite but meaning being infinite.
explanation.ko: 「言有尽而意无穷」는 말은 유한하나 뜻은 무궁무진함을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 这首古诗虽然篇幅短小，却___，令读者反复咀嚼仍觉回味无穷。(Although this ancient poem is short, its words are limited but its meaning is boundless, leaving readers to savor it repeatedly and still find it inexhaustible.)
choices: 语言可以完全穷尽所有意义
意义完全独立于语言存在

explanation.en: 「语言的局限性」means "the limitations of language".
explanation.ko: 「语言的局限性」는 '언어의 한계'를 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 哲学家们长期关注___这一问题，探讨语言究竟能在多大程度上准确传达内心真实的体验。(Philosophers have long focused on the limitations of language, exploring to what extent language can accurately convey genuine inner experience.)
choices: 语言能够完美表达一切思想与情感
语言是获取真理的唯一途径
语言完全独立于思维之外

explanation.en: This describes Laozi's concept from the Dao De Jing.
explanation.ko: 이는 도덕경에 나오는 노자의 개념을 설명한다.

questions.prompt: 老子在《道德经》中提出___的观点，揭示了最深刻的真理往往超越具体形式与言语的局限。(Laozi's proposition in the Dao De Jing that "the greatest sound is nearly silent, the greatest image is formless" reveals that the most profound truths often transcend the limitations of concrete form and language.)
choices: 最伟大的声音听起来反而近乎无声，最伟大的形象反而没有具体的形状——真正深刻的事物往往超越了具体的感官形式
声音越大越好，形象越具体越好
一切事物都必须有具体形态

explanation.en: 「暴露」means "to expose".
explanation.ko: 「暴露」는 '드러내다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这段深邃的哲学论述___了语言在表达终极真理时所面临的固有困境。(This profound philosophical discourse exposed the inherent predicament language faces when expressing ultimate truth.)

explanation.en: 「与其〜不如〜」means "rather than 〜, it's better to 〜".
explanation.ko: 「与其〜不如〜」는 '~하느니 차라리 ~하는 게 낫다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 与其执着于用精确的语言穷尽一切深刻的体悟，___不如学会欣赏那些超越言语、只可意会的境界。(Rather than obsessing over exhausting all profound realizations with precise language, it's better to learn to appreciate those states that transcend words and can only be intuitively grasped.)

explanation.en: 「即使〜也〜」means "even if 〜, still 〜".
explanation.ko: 「即使〜也〜」는 '설령 ~일지라도 ~하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这种深邃的体悟___难以用言语完全表达，___依然可以通过艺术、音乐等形式得到某种程度的传递。(Even though this profound realization is difficult to fully express in words, it can still be conveyed to some extent through forms such as art and music.)

explanation.en: 「之所以〜是因为〜」emphasizes the reason.
explanation.ko: 「之所以〜是因为〜」는 이유를 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 语言之所以在表达某些终极体验时显得力不从心，___是因为人类的思维与感受本身就远比语言所能承载的更加丰富复杂。(The reason language seems inadequate when expressing certain ultimate experiences is precisely because human thought and feeling themselves are far richer and more complex than what language can carry.)

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」means "once 〜, then 〜".
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」는 '일단 ~하면 곧 ~하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 一种体验一旦超越了语言所能承载的边界，___只能依靠直觉与感悟去理解。(Once an experience exceeds the boundaries that language can carry, it can only be understood through intuition and realization.)

explanation.en: 「归根结底〜还是〜」emphasizes the fundamental point.
explanation.ko: 「归根结底〜还是〜」는 근본적인 요점을 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 归根结底，语言的边界___提醒着人类：有些真理终究无法被完全言说，只能被亲身体悟。(In the final analysis, the boundary of language still reminds humanity that some truths ultimately cannot be fully expressed in words, and can only be personally realized.)

explanation.en: 「共同」means "jointly/together".
explanation.ko: 「共同」는 '함께'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 由此可见，语言的精确性与体验的丰富性___构成了一对难以彻底调和的张力。(From this we can see that both the precision of language and the richness of experience jointly form a tension that is hard to fully reconcile.)

explanation.en: 「往往」means "often/frequently".
explanation.ko: 「往往」는 '흔히'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 众所周知，最深刻的艺术作品___能够超越具体的语言文字，直抵观者内心深处。(As everyone knows, the most profound works of art are often able to transcend specific words and language, reaching directly into the depths of the viewer's heart.)

explanation.en: 「岂仅是〜」is a classical-style rhetorical construction.
explanation.ko: 「岂仅是〜」는 고전적 반어 구문이다.

questions.prompt: 语言的边界，岂___表达技巧的局限，实乃人类认知与存在本身所固有的深刻困境。(The boundary of language is by no means merely a limitation of expressive technique, but truly a profound predicament inherent to human cognition and existence itself.)

explanation.en: 「往往」means "often".
explanation.ko: 「往往」는 '흔히'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 诗歌中的留白与沉默___比直白的陈述蕴含更为深远的意味。(The blank space and silence in poetry often carries far more profound meaning than explicit statements.)

explanation.en: 「不如」must come before the verb phrase 学会欣赏〜: 不如学会欣赏 (not 学会不如欣赏).
explanation.ko: 「不如」는 동사구 '学会欣赏〜' 앞에 와야 하므로 '不如学会欣赏'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 与其执着于用精确的语言穷尽一切深刻的体悟，学会不如欣赏那些超越言语、只可意会的境界。(Rather than obsessing over exhausting all profound realizations with precise language, it's better to learn to appreciate those states that transcend words and can only be intuitively grasped.) — find the error
choices: 与其执着于用精确的语言穷尽一切深刻的体悟，不如学会欣赏那些超越言语、只可意会的境界。
与其执着于用精确的语言穷尽一切深刻的体悟，学会不如欣赏那些超越言语、只可意会的境界。
与其执着于用精确的语言穷尽一切深刻的体悟，不如欣赏学会那些超越言语、只可意会的境界。
与其执着于用精确的语言穷尽一切深刻的体悟，学会欣赏不如那些超越言语、只可意会的境界。

explanation.en: The fixed pattern requires 是因为 in that order, not 因为是.
explanation.ko: 고정 문형은 '因为是'가 아니라 '是因为' 순서여야 한다.

questions.prompt: 语言之所以在表达某些终极体验时显得力不从心，因为是人类的思维与感受本身就远比语言所能承载的更加丰富复杂。(The reason language seems inadequate when expressing certain ultimate experiences is precisely because human thought and feeling themselves are far richer and more complex than what language can carry.) — find the error
choices: 语言之所以在表达某些终极体验时显得力不从心，是因为人类的思维与感受本身就远比语言所能承载的更加丰富复杂。
语言之所以在表达某些终极体验时显得力不从心，因为是人类的思维与感受本身就远比语言所能承载的更加丰富复杂。
语言之所以在表达某些终极体验时显得力不从心，是人类因为的思维与感受本身就远比语言所能承载的更加丰富复杂。
语言之所以在表达某些终极体验时显得力不从心，人类是因为的思维与感受本身就远比语言所能承载的更加丰富复杂。

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」is the correct fixed pattern; 「才」does not match the immediate consequence implied by 一旦.
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」가 올바른 고정 문형이며 「才」는 '一旦'의 즉각적 결과와 맞지 않는다.

questions.prompt: 一种体验一旦超越了语言所能承载的边界，只能才依靠直觉与感悟去理解。(Once an experience exceeds the boundaries that language can carry, it can only be understood through intuition and realization.) — find the error
choices: 一种体验一旦超越了语言所能承载的边界，就只能依靠直觉与感悟去理解。
一种体验一旦超越了语言所能承载的边界，只能才依靠直觉与感悟去理解。
一种体验一旦超越了语言所能承载的边界，才只能依靠直觉与感悟去理解。
一种体验一旦超越了语言所能承载的边界，只能依靠才直觉与感悟去理解。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 与其执着于用精确的语言穷尽一切深刻的体悟，不如学会欣赏那些超越言语、只可意会的境界 ("Rather than obsessing over exhausting all profound realizations with precise language, it's better to learn to appreciate those states that transcend words and can only be intuitively grasped").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '与其执着于用精确的语言穷尽一切深刻的体悟，不如学会欣赏那些超越言语、只可意会的境界' (정확한 언어로 모든 심오한 깨달음을 다 표현하려 집착하느니 차라리 말을 초월해 직관적으로만 알 수 있는 경지를 감상하는 법을 배우는 게 낫다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 与其执着于用精确的语言穷尽一切深刻的体悟，__________那些超越言语、只可意会的境界。(Rather than obsessing over exhausting all profound realizations with precise language, it's better to learn to appreciate those states that transcend words and can only be intuitively grasped.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 一种体验一旦超越了语言所能承载的边界，就只能依靠直觉与感悟去理解 ("Once an experience exceeds the boundaries that language can carry, it can only be understood through intuition and realization").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '一种体验一旦超越了语言所能承载的边界，就只能依靠直觉与感悟去理解' (체험은 일단 언어가 담을 수 있는 경계를 넘어서면 오직 직관과 깨달음에 의지해 이해할 수밖에 없다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 一种体验一旦超越了语言所能承载的边界，__________依靠直觉与感悟去理解。(Once an experience exceeds the boundaries that language can carry, it can only be understood through intuition and realization.)
